flags_raised: CRITICAL: $12,783.92 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 38.6% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Behavioral drift detected: 33.4% deviation from historical baseline

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it was not explicitly instructed to verify the transaction amount against the autonomous limit of $5,000.00 before processing.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring compliance with all applicable policies, including verifying the transaction amount does not exceed the autonomous limit of $5,000.00 without obtaining a secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code.
remediation.constraint_added: Verify the transaction amount against the autonomous limit of $5,000.00 and obtain a secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code if exceeded.
preventive_measures: Regularly review and update agent training data to ensure alignment with current policies and procedures
Implement real-time monitoring and alerting for agent decisions that approach or exceed critical thresholds
Conduct quarterly audits of agent performance and compliance with applicable policies to identify and address potential vulnerabilities

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
